footer.tagline: Connecting Canadian homebuyers with trusted mortgage brokers, anonymously and securely.
footer.disclaimer: MortgageMatch is a connection platform. We do not provide mortgage advice or lending services.

home.subtitle: MortgageMatch is the privacy-first marketplace where you describe your mortgage needs without revealing your identity. Verified brokers compete for your business, and you choose who to connect with — on your terms.
home.threeSteps: Three Simple Steps to Your Ideal Broker
home.step1Desc: Describe your mortgage needs anonymously. Share your loan amount, property type, timeline, and preferences without revealing personal details.
home.step2Desc: Verified brokers review your request and express interest. Compare their profiles, reviews, specializations, and proposed approaches side by side.
home.step3Desc: When you find the right broker, choose to share your contact information. Your identity stays private until you decide to reveal it.
home.trustDesc: Your confidence is our foundation. Every aspect of MortgageMatch is designed to protect your privacy and ensure quality.
home.privacyFirstDesc: Your personal information is never shared without your explicit consent. Browse and compare brokers completely anonymously.
home.verifiedBrokersDesc: Every broker on MortgageMatch is licensed, vetted, and verified. We check credentials and monitor reviews so you can browse with confidence.
home.noCommitmentDesc: Explore your options freely. There is no obligation to connect with any broker and no fees for borrowers — ever.
home.readyDesc: Submit your anonymous request in minutes and let brokers come to you.
home.disclaimerFull: MortgageMatch is a marketplace platform that connects borrowers with licensed mortgage brokers. We do not provide mortgage advice, make lending decisions, or act as a lender. All mortgage products and services are offered by independent, licensed brokers. Please consult with a qualified professional before making any financial decisions.

howItWorks.title: How MortgageMatch Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A transparent, privacy-first process that puts borrowers in control and helps brokers find qualified clients.
howItWorks.borrowerTitle: Your Journey to the Right Broker
howItWorks.readyDesc: Submit your anonymous request in minutes — it is completely free for borrowers.
howItWorks.bStep1Desc: Tell us about your mortgage needs — property type, budget, timeline, and preferences. No personal information required. Your request goes live within minutes.
howItWorks.bStep2Desc: Licensed, verified brokers in your area review your request. Interested brokers send you their introduction, including their experience, approach, and how they can help.
howItWorks.bStep3Desc: Review broker profiles, ratings, and introductions side by side. Take your time — there is no pressure or commitment at any stage.
howItWorks.bStep4Desc: When you find the right broker, choose to share your contact information. Start your mortgage journey with a broker you have already vetted.
howItWorks.brStep1Desc: Set up your professional profile showcasing your experience, specialties, areas served, and client reviews. A strong profile helps you stand out.
howItWorks.brStep2Desc: View anonymous mortgage requests from borrowers in your area. Filter by property type, budget range, timeline, and more to find ideal matches.
howItWorks.brStep3Desc: Express interest by sending a personalized introduction. Explain your experience, approach, and how you can help with their specific situation.
howItWorks.brStep4Desc: When a borrower selects you, they share their contact information. Begin your professional relationship with a warm, qualified lead.
howItWorks.faq1Q: Is MortgageMatch really free for borrowers?
howItWorks.faq1A: Yes, completely free. Borrowers never pay anything to use MortgageMatch. Our platform is funded by broker subscriptions.
howItWorks.faq2A: Your personal information is never shared until you explicitly choose to connect with a broker. All requests are fully anonymous — brokers only see your mortgage requirements.
howItWorks.faq3Q: What if I don't like any of the brokers?
howItWorks.faq3A: No problem at all. There is zero obligation to connect with any broker. You can close your request at any time with no consequences.
howItWorks.faq4A: Every broker on MortgageMatch must hold a valid mortgage broker license. We verify credentials, check references, and monitor ongoing performance and reviews.
howItWorks.faq5Q: Can I receive multiple broker responses?
howItWorks.faq5A: Absolutely. In fact, that is the core value of MortgageMatch. Multiple qualified brokers can express interest in your request, giving you the power to compare and choose the best fit.
howItWorks.faq6Q: What if I change my mind?
howItWorks.faq6A: You can withdraw your request or decline any broker at any time. There is no commitment or obligation at any stage of the process.
howItWorks.bStep5Desc: When you find a broker you like, choose to share your contact information. This is the only point at which your identity is revealed — and only to the broker you select.
howItWorks.bStep6Desc: Move forward with confidence. After connecting, your broker guides you through the mortgage process. Leave a review to help future borrowers.
howItWorks.brStep5Desc: If the borrower chooses you, contact information is exchanged and you can begin the consultation process directly.

forBrokers.subtitle: Connect with borrowers who are actively looking for a broker. No cold outreach, no expensive ads — just qualified leads delivered to your dashboard.
forBrokers.advantageSubtitle: A smarter way to build your client base
forBrokers.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business
forBrokers.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of brokers already using MortgageMatch to find qualified clients efficiently.
forBrokers.benefit1Desc: Every request comes from a borrower actively seeking a mortgage broker. No tire-kickers, no cold leads — just real opportunities.
forBrokers.benefit2Desc: Stop spending time and money on ads and cold calls. Borrowers come to you, and you choose which opportunities to pursue.
forBrokers.benefit3Desc: Earn reviews and build a profile that showcases your expertise. Great service leads to more visibility and more connections.
forBrokers.benefit4Desc: No long-term contracts, no hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your business and scale as you grow.
forBrokers.benefit5Desc: Borrowers trust our platform because their data is protected. That trust means higher quality leads and better conversion rates.
forBrokers.benefit6Desc: Manage requests, track introductions, and communicate with borrowers — all from one intuitive, professional dashboard.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Choose the plan that matches your business goals and scale as you grow.
pricing.basicDesc: For individual brokers getting started on the platform.
pricing.proDesc: For established brokers looking to scale their pipeline.
pricing.premiumDesc: For top performers and brokerage teams.
pricing.compareSubtitle: A detailed look at what each plan includes
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan. No credit card required.
pricing.faq1Q: Can I change my plan later?
pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
pricing.faq2Q: Is there a contract or commitment?
pricing.faq2A: No, all plans are month-to-month. You can cancel at any time with no penalties or hidden fees.
pricing.faq3A: A response is when you send an introduction to a borrower's request. You only use a response credit when you actively reach out.
pricing.faq4Q: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
pricing.faq4A: Yes, annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly billing. Contact us for details.
pricing.faq5Q: What happens if I exceed my monthly introductions?
pricing.faq5A: You can purchase additional introductions at a per-response rate, or upgrade your plan for more capacity.
pricing.faq6Q: Can I try before I commit?
pricing.faq6A: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan so you can experience the full platform before committing.

privacy.title: How Your Data Is Protected
privacy.subtitle: Four pillars of our privacy commitment
privacy.transparencySubtitle: Complete transparency about the information we gather and why
privacy.controlSubtitle: The answer is simple: only when you decide.
privacy.step1Desc: Your identity is completely hidden. Brokers only see your mortgage requirements.
privacy.step2Desc: Your identity is still hidden. Compare brokers without any pressure.
privacy.step3Desc: Only now is your contact information shared — and only with the broker you selected.
privacy.verificationSubtitle: Every broker on MortgageMatch goes through a rigorous verification process
privacy.reportDesc: If you ever have a concern about a broker on our platform, contact us at support@mortgagematch.ca. We investigate all reports and take appropriate action.
privacy.ctaDesc: Ready to explore your mortgage options without compromising your privacy?
privacy.protection1Desc: Your personal information is never shared with brokers unless you explicitly choose to connect. Browse, compare, and evaluate completely anonymously.
privacy.protection2Desc: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. Your information is as secure as your online banking.
privacy.protection3Desc: Download or delete your data at any time. We never sell your information to third parties. Period.
privacy.protection4Desc: Every broker is licensed and verified. We continuously monitor for compliance and investigate any reported concerns.
privacy.data1Purpose: To create and secure your account
privacy.data2Purpose: To match you with relevant brokers
privacy.verify4: Regular review of client feedback and ratings

brokerIntros.subtitle: Compare brokers who are interested in helping with your mortgage request.
brokerIntros.disclaimer: Information shown is self-reported by brokers. We recommend verifying credentials independently.
brokerIntros.noIntrosDesc: Check back soon — brokers are reviewing your request.
